name: 54.1 fl oz Glass Champagne Bucket Maroon - Threshold™
description:
Keep your favorite drinks cool and fresh with this Glass Champagne Bucket from Threshold™. This glass champagne bucket is designed like a flower bud and features a wavy edge to bring a refined, artistic touch to any celebration. With a capacity of 54.1 fluid ounces, this maroon bucket is perfect for holidays, dinner parties and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
